summary: This is a project status email from a service provider (likely a sequencing or molecular biology service lab) to a client named Michael. It confirms that a tRNA qPCR project for scientist Anthony Schwartz is on track for completion by end of week, with an expected data analysis delivery date of 9/26/2025.

content_blocks.content: Email greeting and project completion timeline: Project set to be completed by end of this week, with commitment to notify if estimate changes.

content_blocks.title: Project Status Table
content_blocks.content: Project ID: J_081925-qPCR-12. Scientist: Anthony Schwartz. Product: tRNA qPCR. Quantity: 1 x 14 samples. Sample QC: Done. Library Preparation: Done. Library QC: Done. Cluster generation and Sequencing: Done. Data Analysis: Expected 9/26/2025.
